programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A cleaner is found dead in her home and suspicion immediately falls upon her lodger, who is arrested and convicted of her murder. It appears to be an open-and-shut case, but Superintendent Spence begins to question the man's guilt and invites Poirot to help uncover the identity of the real killer. The Belgian sleuth teams up with crime writer Ariadne Oliver (My Family's Zoe Wanamaker) as he tries to crack the case. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Richard Hope, Joe Absolom, Amanda Root, Sian Phillips and Raquel Cassidy

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Omnibus. Yasmeen's fate hangs in the balance as the trial draws to a close, the residents band together to halt Ray's bulldozer, and Daniel uncovers the truth about Adam and Carla

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective's friend Sir Charles Cartwright (guest star Martin Shaw) hosts a cocktail party at his home in Cornwall, where an amiable local priest chokes to death on his drink. There seems to be no motive for murder, and no trace of poison found in the victim's glass, but weeks later, when Sir Charles's doctor friend Sir Bartholomew Strange dies in similar circumstances, he and Poirot team up to investigate. Drama, with Art Malik, Jane Asher and Anna Carteret, and David Suchet in the title role

programme.title: Goodbye Mr Chips
programme.desc: Martin Clunes stars as an earnest Latin master working at the Brookfield School of the 1880s, where he meets and marries his true love Kathie and finds himself touched by politics, grief and the utter devastation of World War One. Charting more than 50 years of one man's extraordinary life, the story ends in the 1930s, as a wise, elderly and much-loved Mr Chipping lives out his last days in retirement. Frank Delaney's adaptation of James Hilton's timeless classic, which has never been out of print since first appearing as a magazine serialisation in 1934, and for which Robert Donat whipped an Oscar from under the nose of Gone with the Wind's Clark Gable in the 1939 film production. Also starring Victoria Hamilton, Conleth Hill and Patrick Malahide

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Oswald Cooper is the prime suspect in the rape of a teenage girl, but presents an alibi supported by three pillars of the community. When Cooper is murdered, Lewis discovers a web of deceit going back 20 years, in which the dead man was used by the trio to cover up a sordid series of secrets - but the case soon takes on a personal dimension for the inspector. Kwame Kwei-Armah, Sean McGinley, Richard McCabe and Daniela Nardini guest star, with Kevin Whately

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A barmaid's murder leads Lewis (Kevin Whately) and Hathaway (Laurence Fox) to a respected professor, who admits he once had an affair with the woman. However, they discover the killing was copied straight from the pages of a popular fantasy novel written by an Oxford tutor, suggesting it may be the work of a crazed fan - or something even more sinister. Guest starring Art Malik, Tom Mison and James Fox, father of Laurence

John Nettles and John Hopkins star, with guest appearances by Haydn Gwynne and Margery Mason

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A serial killer begins targeting members of a religious group that claims to provide guidance for lost souls. Guest starring Ian McNeice and Rachael Stirling alongside Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Vanity Fair

The Sedley family takes a holiday in Germany, where they are unexpectedly reunited with Becky - who gets the chance to redeem a lifetime of selfishness by performing a single good deed on behalf of her dearest friend

programme.desc: A woman is tormented by calls from her supposedly deceased husband, whose lifeless body was pulled from the sea several weeks earlier. programme.desc: The youthful heir to a fortune disappears from boarding school in the dead of night - but his aristocratic father's aversion to publicity makes the case particularly difficult to investigate. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: A top model is murdered by a hit-and-run driver. Dempsey and Makepeace discover she had connections at the highest level in government circles. When the two detectives make further investigations they uncover some disturbing facts.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry's girlfriend Debbie starts work as a mobile hairdresser. Unfortunately the first house she attends is robbed, and she and Terry become suspects. When Arthur becomes involved, the police take over his lock-up. Vintage comedy drama, starring Dennis Waterman and George Cole

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: As whole estates of houses begin to crumble, CI5 uncovers corruption surrounding the awarding of contracts to build homes. Maurice Denham and Bill Fraser guest star alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A bad dream has Regan's girlfriend fearing for his safety, and her visions ring true when he gets involved in a case involving a stolen lorryload of cigars. The plot thickens when illicit cocaine is retrieved and arms stolen from the US are discovered to be on their way to a military faction in Ireland. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Francesca Cumani and Ed Chamberlin present day one of the December Meeting from Cheltenham, with four races at the home of National Hunt Racing. Today's feature race is the 3.00 Cross Country Chase, the second race of the season over the unique test and November's renewal was won by Kingswell Theatre. There's also action from Bangor, with a competitive handicap hurdle on the card. Analysis from Mick Fitzgerald and Luke Harvey, with reports from Oli Bell, Alice Plunkett and Matt Chapman

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry is pleased when villainous old friend Jack ''Oily' Wragg returns to England, However, his pleasure melts away when he learns that there are old scores to settle and that Wragg intends to stage one final heist. Light-hearted crime drama, guest starring Pete Postlethwaite, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The team assists the Russian authorities in tracking down a former spy, whose defection threatens international security. Cowley is anxious to locate him first amid fears others may prefer to silence him permanently. Drama, starring Gordon Jackson, Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The Contessa is used as bait in a trap to lure an assassin out into the open. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt

programme.desc: We're in Italy to drive a race car for the road, and in Bristol with a pair of hot-hatches. We try launch control in an electric rocketship, drive Ferrari's latest racegrade weaponry and take to the track in three everyday sports coupes

programme.desc: Four soldiers are sent on a top-secret mission in Iraq that results in them being imprisoned for a crime they did not commit. Western, with Yul Brynner, Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, Robert Vaughn, James Coburn and Eli Wallach

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle begin an investigation into why a city's crime rate is steadily falling. They later find themselves victimised by local officers after being charged with a minor traffic offence. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A Scottish detective on the trail of a gang of crooks requests help, and the squad resolves to catch his quarry. However, it becomes apparent that the visiting sleuth is holding back some important information that Regan and his colleagues need to know. TV presenter Janet Ellis features in a supporting role

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Hornblower's resourcefulness turns the attack on the Spanish-held fortress into a famous victory, but Buckland's treachery puts his life into further danger. Surviving a risky mission to blow up the fortifications and an attempt by the prisoners to take command of the Renown, the hero faces the death penalty for pushing Captain Sawyer into the hold - and hopes Archie's dying words can save him from the noose. Naval adventure, based on the stories by CS Forester, and starring Ioan Gruffudd

programme.title: The Cowboys (1972)
programme.desc: An ageing rancher finds himself short-handed when his workers abandon him during a gold rush, and grudgingly hires a group of schoolboys to help him on a 400-mile cattle drive. Although at first they feel out of their depth, the youngsters quickly learn to work like men - but face a dangerous challenge ahead as a gang of rustlers begins to stalk them. Western, with John Wayne, Roscoe Lee Browne and Bruce Dern

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: A woman is tormented by calls from her supposedly deceased husband, whose lifeless body was pulled from the sea several weeks earlier. While she is admitted to a sanatorium to prevent a nervous breakdown, Templar works on the premise that her spouse may indeed still be alive. Roger Moore and Sylvia Syms star

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The youthful heir to a fortune disappears from boarding school in the dead of night - but his aristocratic father's aversion to publicity makes the case particularly difficult to investigate. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: A top model is murdered by a hit-and-run driver. Dempsey and Makepeace discover she had connections at the highest level in government circles. When the two detectives make further investigations they uncover some disturbing facts.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry's girlfriend Debbie starts work as a mobile hairdresser. Unfortunately the first house she attends is robbed, and she and Terry become suspects. When Arthur becomes involved, the police take over his lock-up. Vintage comedy drama, starring Dennis Waterman and George Cole

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: As whole estates of houses begin to crumble, CI5 uncovers corruption surrounding the awarding of contracts to build homes. Maurice Denham and Bill Fraser guest star alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A bad dream has Regan's girlfriend fearing for his safety, and her visions ring true when he gets involved in a case involving a stolen lorryload of cigars. The plot thickens when illicit cocaine is retrieved and arms stolen from the US are discovered to be on their way to a military faction in Ireland. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Francesca Cumani and Ed Chamberlin present day one of the December Meeting from Cheltenham, with four races at the home of National Hunt Racing. Today's feature race is the 3.00 Cross Country Chase, the second race of the season over the unique test and November's renewal was won by Kingswell Theatre. There's also action from Bangor, with a competitive handicap hurdle on the card. Analysis from Mick Fitzgerald and Luke Harvey, with reports from Oli Bell, Alice Plunkett and Matt Chapman

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry is pleased when villainous old friend Jack ''Oily' Wragg returns to England, However, his pleasure melts away when he learns that there are old scores to settle and that Wragg intends to stage one final heist. Light-hearted crime drama, guest starring Pete Postlethwaite, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The team assists the Russian authorities in tracking down a former spy, whose defection threatens international security. Cowley is anxious to locate him first amid fears others may prefer to silence him permanently. Drama, starring Gordon Jackson, Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The Contessa is used as bait in a trap to lure an assassin out into the open. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt

programme.desc: A look back at a selection of sports covered by ITV, including horse racing, Formula One and darts

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Five friends from Manchester who work in the telecoms industry answer questions about top 10 lists, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round. Quiz, hosted by Warwick Davis

programme.title: On the Road
programme.desc: We're in Italy to drive a race car for the road, and in Bristol with a pair of hot-hatches. We try launch control in an electric rocketship, drive Ferrari's latest racegrade weaponry and take to the track in three everyday sports coupes

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: An orientation day gives the hapless Mr Bean a chance to revisit his school days, and it is not long before he lives up to his disaster-prone reputation. Comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean

programme.title: Mr Bean

programme.title: Mr Bean

programme.title: Mr Bean

programme.title: British Superbike Championship Highlights
programme.desc: A review of the 2020 championship, which saw Australian former champ Joshua Brookes trying to lift the crown for a second time. With spectacular racing, defying crashes and up close fairing bashing, the 2020 season was a rollercoaster of highs and lows

programme.desc: Mr Burns wins a professional basketball team in a poker game at the annual billionaires' retreat. He decides to build a state-of-the-art stadium in an effort to lure fans, but the proposed site is on the last remaining bee colony in Springfield - prompting Lisa to lead a protest

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes a trip to the mall to buy a new gadget, while Bart manages to cause chaos. After making a hasty retreat, he befriends a boy named Bashir - but Homer begins to believe that his son's new pal is involved in a terrorist plot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa learns she is good at crossword puzzles and enters a city-wide contest. Homer opens a break-up service after discovering he has a flair for letting loved ones down, but gets himself into trouble with his daughter when he places a bet against her in the competition

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa goes on an archaeological dig with the school, and uncovers an unusual fossil, which the townsfolk are convinced is the skeleton of an angel. Thinking he can make a profit out of the find, Homer steals it, puts it in his garage, and charges people to see it. With the guest voice of scientist Stephen Jay Gould

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers
programme.desc: In London, Nastassja makes a Noah's ark-themed cake for a namesake one year old, while Molly's creates a giant butterfly cake for a birthday surprise

programme.title: Live Heineken Champions Cup Rugby Union
programme.desc: Bristol Bears v Clermont Auvergne (Kick-off 1.00pm). Lee McKenzie presents coverage of both teams' opening Pool B match, which comes from Ashton Gate. The Bears lifted the European Challenge Cup last season, but face a tough test against the French outfit, who have won this competition on three occasions, with the most recent of those triumphs coming in 2017. With commentary by Miles Harrison and pitchside reports from Ed Jackson

programme.title: Heston's Feasts
programme.desc: The chef puts together what he considers to be the ultimate banquet, using courses from extravagant meals he has cooked in the past. He revisits the meat fruit appetiser from his Middle Ages dinner and the mock turtle soup from the Victorian feast. For the centrepiece, he chooses the Tudor-themed cockentrice, and rounds off the meal with a saucy dessert inspired by the decadence of Ancient Rome

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Action from the battle for pole position in the 17th and final round of the campaign, held at Yas Marina Circuit. Lewis Hamilton qualified fastest here last year and few would back against him doing so again as he looks to end another victorious campaign on a high. Steve Jones presents, with analysis from David Coulthard and Mark Webber

programme.title: Scotland: My Life in the Wild
programme.desc: Documentary following wildlife cameraman Hamza Yassin, as he documents the animals that live around his home in the Ardnamurchan peninsula on the west coast of Scotland. The film follows him over the course of the summer as he goes in search of images of red deer, pine martens, white-tailed sea eagles and puffins

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking at Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver looks at ways to make gifts to share with loved ones, including roasted mulled wine ham that is cooked and glazed in all the tastes of Christmas, accompanied by cheeses that can be flavoured and delivered ready to be baked. Jamie also helps his children create the ultimate yule log for their grandparents

programme.title: Jungle Mystery: Lost Kingdoms of the Amazon
programme.desc: Ella Al-Shamahi travels to the Colombian jungle, an area that has been off-limits for years due to drugs and civil war, where archaeologists have found what could be the biggest cache of prehistoric rock art in the world. From this vital clue, Ella pieces together the extraordinary story of how nomadic hunter-gatherers began to settle, grow crops and expand their populations into a great civilisation - one described by the first Spanish invaders more than 500 years ago

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores Edinburgh and its role in the union between England and Scotland. She discovers how the famous case of Burke and Hare's bodysnatching influenced British medical law, and visits the Royal Bank of Scotland, where she uncovers evidence of the world's first overdraft. Plus, the role played by Henry Dundas, whose statue stands in St Andrew's Square, in the continuation of the slave trade

programme.title: The Shape of Water (2017)
programme.desc: Elisa Esposito is a mute singleton who lives above a cinema. Although friends with Giles, a neighbouring artist, she lives a lonely existence. While he has designs on the cafe worker nearby, Elisa cleans up at top-secret government lab, a bus ride away in Baltimore, Maryland. One day in 1962, she makes a life-changing discovery when Elisa finds an amphibious humanoid creature who is being held captive, and they embark on an extraordinary relationship. Guillermo del Toro's Oscar and Bafta-winning fantasy, starring Sally Hawkins, Michael Shannon, Octavia Spencer and Doug Jones

programme.title: Split (2016)
programme.desc: After being abducted by a kidnapper with multiple personalities, three young women are soon engaged in a fight for survival. Meanwhile, an oblivious psychiatrist tries to ease her patient's fractured mind as a 24th character with apparent superhuman abilities attempts to dominate his body. M Night Shyamalan's thriller, starring James McAvoy, Anya Taylor-Joy and Betty Buckley

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Tony confesses his true feelings to Diane, and Jordan asks to move back in with the Lomax family. Imran and Brooke try to convince Sid to form a band with them

programme.title: Fifteen to One
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts the general knowledge quiz in which 15 contestants try to win a place in the end-of-series final, when a £40,000 jackpot will be up for grabs

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Vet Will transports a bull elephant to a new home, while marine biologist Alison prepares to release three critically endangered African penguins back into the ocean

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The prodigy dismantles the refrigerator to stop it making an annoying humming noise and is then forced to get a paper round to pay for the repairs to the damaged appliance. Comedy spin-off prequel to The Big Bang Theory, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Meemaw intervenes when Sheldon gets jealous of Dr Sturgis bonding with Paige, a rival 10-year-old genius. In the meantime, Mary invites Paige's family over for a play date

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes fun of Leonard's habit of collecting sci-fi memorabilia, so he decides to give it up - but his friends object and do everything possible to persuade him not to change his ways. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's friends all fall for his sexy twin sister, who is paying him a visit, but he declares he will have the final say on who can date her - an announcement that particularly dismays Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart uses industrial adhesive to stick assorted novelty items to his face, while Lisa persuades Homer to let her visit the museum - but takes the wrong bus and becomes lost in an unfamiliar part of Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge try to breathe new life into their relationship by canoodling in public places, while Bart and Lisa use Grampa's metal detector to hunt for hidden treasure

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Glamorous Hollywood star Sara Sloane visits Springfield and becomes infatuated with Ned Flanders, who finds himself asking Homer for dating advice. Featuring the voices of Helen Fielding and Marisa Tomei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer are invited on a weekend away at the Jersey Shore to smooth over their differences with Fat Tony and Selma, who have married after a whirlwind romance. Bart discovers a talent for detecting the location of truffles, which Lisa jumps at the chance to nurture

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer chat to Bob Mortimer and Paul Whitehouse about the Gone Fishing Christmas special, while comedian Romesh Ranganathan talks about his book As Good as It Gets. Rick Astley discusses his single, Love This Christmas. TV presenter Maya Jama talks about RuPaul's Drag Race, and Eels frontman Mark Oliver Everett discusses the band's new album, Earth to Dora. Plus there's music from Jamie Cullum

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer discovers a talent for styling hair and opens a salon that becomes very popular, but begins to feel his gift is a curse as he must listen to people's problems and gossip. Meanwhile, Milhouse decides to live each day to the fullest and professes his love for Lisa - only to have his heart broken

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa gets her hands on a collection of keys to every door in Springfield, and soon uncovers a hidden classroom beneath the school, telling Principal Skinner about her discovery. He confiscates the key from her, but she remains determined to investigate the mysterious room

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the children's books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman

programme.title: Christmas in New York: Inside the Plaza
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the Manhattan hotel over the festive period, following staff at their busiest time of the year, and the guests willing to spend up to £30,000 a night. From arranging a taste of Christmas movie magic with themed £3,000 welcome packages to planning the hotel's star attraction of the Grand Christmas Buffet, the programme reveals how much effort goes into ensuring that 400 guests have the happiest holidays.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones presents action from the 17th and final round of the campaign, held at Yas Marina Circuit. programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking at Christmas
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jamie Oliver gets creative and makes a pie that embraces whatever remains from the Christmas dinner. Melting down all the leftover bits and pieces from the cheeseboard, he creates the simplest retro fondue we can make in minutes. And smashing up the leftover mince pies and Christmas pudding, the chef rolls up a treat with his 'anything goes' strudel

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: With no guests to entertain at the chateau this year, the overhaul of the orangery continues. All the family come together to build an open kitchen, create a pop-up restaurant and cook a menu of memories featuring dishes from Dick and Angel's years together

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Mariah Carey's Magical Christmas Special, I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!, Coronation Street, Swamp People: Serpent Invasion, Nigella's Cook, Eat, Repeat, Tiny World, news coverage of the Brexit stalemate and the Covid vaccine. They also comment on Health Secretary Matt Hancock's recent TV appearances

programme.title: The Red Shadows
programme.desc: For 25 years, Aurore Garnier, a police officer on the Cote d'Azur, has been obsessed with the abduction of her four-year-old sister Clara, an action that also led to the death of their mother. Eventually Aurore gets a lead that may be the final piece of her puzzle. Drama, starring Nadia Fares, Manon Azem and Antoine Dulery. In French with English subtitles

programme.title: Mother! (2017)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Determined to reverse the decision, she enlists sponsors and artists to help champion her cause, including the town's ace sculpting artisan, who seems reluctant to compete this year. Festive romantic drama, starring Taylor Cole and Damon Runyan

However, the two get snowed in together before any of the other guests can arrive. In the building by themselves, a fairy-tale snowscape outside and desires building inside they find that being alone together is all the Christmas magic they need. Romantic drama, starring Henderson Wade and Zarrin Darnell-Martin

programme.title: Write Before Christmas (2019)
programme.desc: A woman sends Christmas cards to people who have influenced her life - the aunt who raised her, her younger brother in the military, a pop star who provided the soundtrack to her life, the music teacher who inspired her, and her best friend, who always told the truth. The recipients are each inspired to act in their own lives to make them better. Drama, starring Torrey DeVitto

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: When Shane and Dipi realise what Mackenzie has been put through, they put aside their differences to support her, and it is a sad day for the Greysons

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: The Gadget Show
programme.desc: Craig Charles hosts The Gadget Show Awards 2020, an essential rundown of everything that's made it big this year in tech. Jon Bentley puts three home cinema set-ups through their paces, while Jordan Erica Webber and Harry Wallop enjoy a bout of gaming unboxing and reveal how to stream Christmas flicks for free

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways
programme.desc: Starting out from the Regency splendour of Cheltenham, Rob Bell crosses the Cotswolds, following the 46-mile route of the Banbury and Cheltenham Direct Railway. The line passes many quarries, all producing the famous Cotswold stone - some now abandoned and some still supplying stone to sites like Hampton Court. With numerous hills to negotiate, this railway was never an express route, but it did open up this landscape to visitors for the first time. From the late 1800s, tourists piled in by rail to explore picture postcard villages like Bourton-on-the-Water, establishing a new local 'industry'

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: A trip through Devon to the tip of Cornwall, going back in time to recapture the golden age of luxury train travel. Travelling in the elegantly restored Statesman, passengers relax in its vintage carriages and enjoy the exquisite service. The first stop is on the stunning Devon coast, which suffered devastating destruction during the heavy winter storms of 2014. From Dawlish, it heads to Cornwall and across the Royal Albert Bridge, a masterpiece of railway engineering

programme.title: Live Boxing
programme.desc: Sam Eggington v Ashley Theophane. Coverage of the super-welterweight contest, which takes place at Fly By Nite Rehearsal Studios in Redditch. Veteran Theophane is fighting in the UK for the first time since 2012 here and is on an eight-fight winning streak, while Eggington is hoping to bounce back from his recent unanimous-decision loss to Ted Cheeseman at the Matchroom Fight Camp event in August that cost him the IBF International title

programme.title: Good Girls' Guide to Kinky Sex

programme.desc: Part one of two. Abby's homeland security think-tank is compromised when its leader is found to have been murdered, and a theoretical guide to how to pull off a terror attack is stolen

programme.title: Building Britain's Canals
programme.desc: Writer and historian Dan Jones navigates Britain's longest canal to be built by just one company, the Leeds and Liverpool Canal. Built to link the economically booming counties of Yorkshire and Lancashire, this 19th-century superhighway was experimental for the time, and made Liverpool the busiest port in the world. In Burnley, the cotton capital of the 19th century, Dan visits the world's only steam-powered cotton mill, where enough cloth was woven each year to reach to the moon and back two-and-a-half times

programme.desc: Santa Claus loses control of his sleigh in tricky weather conditions and crashes into a passing car - and the resulting bump on the head leads to a total loss of memory. It is left to a youngster to help him beat the amnesia and deliver presents around the world in time for Christmas morning. Family comedy, starring Leslie Nielsen, Max Morrow, Tommy Davidson, Stephen Eckholdt and Robyn Lively

Plus, a look at the history of Quality Street and Roses, from their origins in Victorian Britain to their sometimes disastrous attempts to branch out into new flavours

programme.title: Princess Alice: The Royals' Greatest Secret
programme.desc: The remarkable story of the Queen's mother-in-law and Prince Philip's mother, Princess Alice of Battenberg, featuring archive footage and interviews with those who know her story best. Her remarkable life saw her born deaf and diagnosed with schizophrenia, sent to a mental asylum, given controversial electroshock treatment and treated by Sigmund Freud. She also found an order of nursing nuns in Greece, before finally coming to live at Buckingham Palace, with the Queen

Subjecting the lawyer and his family to a terrifying campaign of intimidation, he uses his knowledge of the law to stay untouchable. Martin Scorsese's thriller remake, starring Robert De Niro, Nick Nolte, Jessica Lange and Juliette Lewis, with cameo appearances by Gregory Peck, Robert Mitchum and Martin Balsam, who all appeared in the 1962 original

Depression-era drama, starring Frank Lovejoy, Lloyd Bridges, Kathleen Ryan and Richard Carlson

Western adventure, starring John Wayne, Albert Dekker, Martha Scott and Gabby Hayes

Western, starring Edward G Robinson, Barbara Stanwyck and Glenn Ford

Richard Fleischer's sci-fi adventure, starring Raquel Welch, Stephen Boyd, Donald Pleasence and Edmond O'Brien

programme.title: GI Joe: The Rise of Cobra (2009)
programme.desc: When a powerful experimental weapon is snatched by a mysterious terrorist organisation, two of the soldiers guarding it are recruited into a top-secret military strike force. As they go in search of the stolen technology, they uncover a plot by its creator to take over the world. Action adventure, with Channing Tatum, Sienna Miller and Christopher Eccleston

programme.title: Hell or High Water (2016)
programme.desc: Divorcee Toby Howard and his ex-con older brother Tanner embark on a meticulously-planned crime spree, hoping to rob every branch of the West Texas bank that has threatened to foreclose on their family ranch. However, they soon find themselves being pursued by two veteran Texas Rangers. Neo-western drama, starring Jeff Bridges, Chris Pine and Ben Foster

programme.title: Starred Up (2013)
programme.desc: An inmate in a young offender's institution is transferred to an adult prison when he proves too violent to control. He is reunited with his father, who has spent most of his life behind bars, and comes to realise that his survival in this brutal new environment hinges on learning to control his rage. Drama, starring Jack O'Connell and Rupert Friend

programme.title: The Family (2013)
programme.desc: A gangster testifies against his partners in crime, before he and his family are relocated to rural France under the witness protection program. Despite their FBI handler's efforts to keep them under control, they soon return to their criminal ways - while the mobsters they betrayed are soon on their trail. Comedy thriller, with Robert De Niro, Michelle Pfeiffer and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: Kubo and the Two Strings (2016)
programme.desc: A boy unwittingly summons an evil spirit to wreak havoc on his peaceful village home. The only hope of defeating the vengeful creature is to find a magical suit of armour belonging to the boy's father - but finding it will entail matching wits with an assortment of monstrous foes. Animated adventure, with the voices of Charlize Theron, Art Parkinson and Matthew McConaughey

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness Interview Special

He gradually takes a shine to the place, while the locals are more interested in the money they can get for parting with it. Bill Forsyth's comedy drama, starring Peter Riegert, Burt Lancaster, Denis Lawson, Peter Capaldi, Jenny Seagrove and Fulton Mackay

programme.title: It's a Wonderful Life (1946)
programme.desc: A hard-working, small-town businessman comes to think his life has been a complete waste of time and tries to commit suicide. At the last minute, his guardian angel pays him a visit and makes him realise his true worth by showing him what would have happened to those around him had he never been born. Fantasy drama, starring James Stewart, Donna Reed, Lionel Barrymore, Henry Travers, Beulah Bondi, Thomas Mitchell and Frank Faylen

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness Interview Special
programme.desc: Director JJ Abrams discusses making the second instalment in the sci-fi series

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

programme.title: Deadpool (2016)
programme.desc: A fast-talking former mercenary develops terminal cancer, and agrees to be the subject in a shady experiment in the hope of a cure. The procedure leaves him horribly disfigured, but also possessing superhuman abilities which he immediately puts to use in a quest for revenge on the man responsible for his hideous appearance. Superhero comedy adventure, starring Ryan Reynolds and Morena Baccarin

programme.title: The Witch (2018)
programme.desc: A young girl escapes from a shadowy facility in the middle of nowhere, and is found bloody and unconscious by an elderly couple. She can't remember a thing, not even her name - who is she and what happened to her? Supernatural action thriller, starring Da-mi Kim. In English and Korean with English subtitles

programme.title: Blue Velvet (1986)
programme.desc: A college student discovers a severed ear in a field, and is drawn into the dangerous underworld of his apparently peaceful home town. As events unfold, his curiosity leads him to the sinister relationship between a violent sociopath and a beautiful singer, whose vulnerability and sexuality bewitch him. David Lynch's thriller, starring Kyle MacLachlan, Dennis Hopper, Isabella Rossellini and Dean Stockwell

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask (1977)
programme.desc: The despotic king of France imprisons his identical twin and sees to it that he always wears a metal mask to avoid being identified, but musketeer D'Artagnan has a plan to restore the rightful heir to the throne. Swashbuckling adventure, based on the classic story by Alexandre Dumas, starring Richard Chamberlain in a dual role, with Patrick McGoohan, Louis Jourdan and Jenny Agutter

programme.title: Baggage Claim (2013)
programme.desc: An air hostess is horrified at the thought of her younger sister getting married while she is still single. She realises her job gives her access to eligible men from across America, and begins clocking up thousands of air miles as she scours the country for a potential fiance. Romantic comedy, with Paula Patton and Taye Diggs

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016)
programme.desc: The sewer-dwelling heroes discover their arch enemy Shredder has returned from another dimension, and made a deal with an alien warlord. Assisted by two mutant henchman, Shredder goes in search of a lost device that will allow his new ally to mount an invasion of Earth. Action adventure sequel, starring Megan Fox, Will Arnett and Stephen Amell

programme.title: The Pink Panther Strikes Again (1976)

However, doing away with the lucky lawman proves harder than anticipated - even for the world's best assassins. Comedy sequel, starring Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Lesley-Anne Down, Burt Kwouk and Leonard Rossiter

programme.title: Max Steel (2016)

As this power grows to dangerous proportions, Max meets Steel, a small but feisty flying alien who says he can help. Family fantasy adventure, starring Ben Winchell, Maria Bello and Andy Garcia, with the voice of Josh Brener

Director Edward Zwick's blockbusting action thriller sequel based on Lee Child's novel, starring Tom Cruise, Cobie Smulders, Danika Yarosh and Aldis Hodge

However, when the woman he loves is murdered by his psychotic brother, Logan returns to his old enemies for help in seeking revenge - and is offered the chance to become indestructible. Superhero adventure prequel, starring Hugh Jackman and Liev Schreiber

Guest starring boxer Mike Tyson

programme.desc: Leonard and Penny celebrate Valentine's Day, but their evening takes a turn for the worse when the latter's ex-boyfriend proposes to his girlfriend in the same restaurant. Meanwhile, Sheldon enlists the help of his assistant Alex to find the perfect gift for Amy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is upset after Lucy runs away in the middle of their date, leaving the gang to cheer him up. However, when Howard bumps into her, she admits she is incredibly shy. Meanwhile, Sheldon asks Penny to help with a new episode of Fun with Flags, and because he is impressed by her acting ability, the friends go to see her in a performance of A Streetcar Named Desire

programme.desc: While investigating a string of hotel robberies together, Peralta is upset to discover Santiago is considering leaving the precinct to work with his rival, the Vulture, in the special crimes unit. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard isn't thrilled when he finds out Penny is considering taking a new job that has been offered to her by her former boyfriend Zack. Sheldon attempts to develop his brain further by learning new skills

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD kisses Carla on a drunken night out - leaving them both feeling awkward around Turk. Meanwhile, Elliot deals with a difficult patient who has taken 'enhancement' pills and Dr Cox's son is injured

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD and Carla are given the silent treatment by Turk, who is still furious about their kiss. The Janitor feels embarrassed by his new uniform, and Dr Cox enlists Elliot's aid in treating a female patient. Comedy, starring Zach Braff, Sarah Chalke and John C McGinley

Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.desc: The squad has time to kill when the arrival of the Serbian president's motorcade to Brooklyn is delayed, so Peralta launches the seventh annual Jimmy Jab Games, an eccentric series of races and contests held in the precinct building. Meanwhile, Jeffords and Holt must set up a new drug task force approved by Holt's nemesis, Madeline Wuntch

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones must face their worst fears in order to reclaim the Power of Three. Fantasy drama about three young witches with supernatural powers, starring Melonie Diaz, Sarah Jeffery, Madeleine Mantock and Rupert Evans

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys find a laptop that has some virtual currency on it. The only snag is, the computer belongs to Penny's ex-boyfriend Zack. Meanwhile, a seven-year-old video reveals a secret about Leonard and Penny's relationship

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try to eliminate stress from the planning of their wedding by applying mathematics to the process. Meanwhile, Raj 'breaks up' with Howard after realising that his best friend is actually damaging his confidence

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at a classic episode of the soap from 1998. When Mandy goes missing, her boyfriend Sol is questioned by the police. Elsewhere, Lucy is feeling pushed out of the family business when Kurt seems to be getting all the golden opportunities

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets his celebrity contestants challenges involving snowglobes, rubber ducks and wooden spoons, inviting Liza Tarbuck, Alice Levine, Asim Chaudhry, Russell Howard and Tim Vine attempt to impress Greg with their creativity and ingenuity. Alex Horne provides crucial data analytics

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Now that he's officially back at the precinct and desperate to solve a real criminal case, Peralta finds a loophole to get out of his temporarily designated desk duty. Unfortunately, that loophole rests on his ability to pass an official evaluation performed by Captain Holt. While Boyle provides Peralta with moral support, Jeffords and Santiago help Diaz, who believes Pimento may be cheating on her

programme.title: World War Z (2013)
programme.desc: A virus sweeps across the globe, turning everyone infected into mindless, ravening zombies. As entire countries fall into chaos, a United Nations investigator sets off on a journey around the world to discover the cause of the pandemic and hopefully find a cure before human civilisation is brought to an end. Thriller based on the novel by Max Brooks, starring Brad Pitt and Mireille Enos

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys become stranded in the middle of nowhere when Leonard's car is stolen en route to the Bakersfield comic-book convention. Meanwhile, back at home, the women try to work out why the guys are so fascinated with such publications

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is furious when the university forces him to work with Kripke, while Howard's hobby lands him in financial trouble. However, that doesn't stop him and Raj getting expensive action figures of themselves made - much to Bernadette's disapproval

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. First up is 24-year-old Rebecca, a singer from Nottinghamshire who is tired of always having her heart broken by guys with a bad boy image and wants to see if choosing a date in the studio can help her pick a better mate. Next up is 25-year-old development manager Dan from Durham, who has unsuccessfully tried countless dating apps and hopes to find Mr Right

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on shows airing in April 2016, including Guy Martin's Wall of Death: Live, Bake Off Creme de la Creme, EastEnders, Bear Grylls: Mission Survive, Antiques Roadshow, This Farming Life, The Night Manager and the news. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively - sometimes emotional - discussions from the comfort of their own homes

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: The prophecy that Angel will kill Connor seems to be coming true as the vampire experiences sudden mood swings and cravings for blood. Wesley tries to stop it by kidnapping the child, but Holtz seizes the opportunity to get his revenge by taking Connor for himself

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam and Jonny are horrified to find their parents in a hot tub in the garden, drinking champagne. Neighbour Jim arrives to ask them if they can look after Wilson because his sister, who's terrified of dogs, is coming to visit. When the boys are sent out to get a takeaway, they spot Jim in the restaurant alongside a woman sporting the world's most annoying laugh. When Jim and his date turn up - soaking wet - at the house, the family has to endure a hellish dinner with them. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: When Mum's best friend, Val moves in after rowing with her husband, Dad soon finds himself driven to distraction after the visitor repeatedly tidies up the house and chucks away all his old stuff. Tensions reach boiling-point when Val finds an aged tin of meat with a 'best before 1996' date that Dad has been storing in his shed. Tracy-Ann Oberman plays the unwelcome visitor in writer Robert Popper's award-winning comedy, alongside series regulars Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny talks himself into an unlikely business partnership with Bob. David gets an interview at a women's clothing shop, while Moira reluctantly cares for an ailing Alexis. Sitcom, starring Eugene Levy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny celebrate Valentine's Day, but their evening takes a turn for the worse when the latter's ex-boyfriend proposes to his girlfriend in the same restaurant. Meanwhile, Sheldon enlists the help of his assistant Alex to find the perfect gift for Amy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is upset after Lucy runs away in the middle of their date, leaving the gang to cheer him up. However, when Howard bumps into her, she admits she is incredibly shy. Meanwhile, Sheldon asks Penny to help with a new episode of Fun with Flags, and because he is impressed by her acting ability, the friends go to see her in a performance of A Streetcar Named Desire

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Marshall and Lily become concerned that Ted's new girlfriend is a deranged stalker, but he insists they are destined to be together. Meanwhile, Barney heads to Canada to track down a mystery man with whom Robin was dangerously obsessed as a teenager. Sitcom, guest starring Jason Priestley

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted's friends tell him to break up with his girlfriend Jeanette, because they find her behaviour stressful. However, it is only when she gains access to his flat and barricades herself in his bedroom that he considers their advice. Meanwhile, Robin is frightened to hold baby Marvin in case she drops him. Guest starring boxer Mike Tyson

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring the master of business card throwing, the best way to calm a crying baby, and a dating agency for sea captains

programme.title: A Royal Winter (2017)
programme.desc: A young woman on a European holiday finds herself in the middle of a real-life fairy tale when a chance meeting with a handsome local leads to something more. Drama, starring Merritt Patterson, Jack Donnelly and Samantha Bond

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost helps Crystal Tobeck and Jeff Lawrence, who doubled their family overnight when they got together, bringing kids from previous marriages under one roof

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Yanis plans to tie the knot at the Eiffel Tower, while his fiancee Chanise would prefer a tranquil wedding in the countryside - which has repercussions when the plans are leaked

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Rugby-loving groom-to-be Wes plans a wedding in front of 26,000 people at a Premiership match, but his fiancee Charlotte is dreaming of a much more intimate day

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Things come to a head between Liv and Verity, while Emily has to decide who she believes as she tries to find out what really happened with Harvey and Habbs in Cornwall

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: Best Bits
programme.desc: The second of two highlights programmes celebrating the show's 10th anniversary features the stories of popular contestants Val and Liam. Featuring a homage to the nation's favourite squirrel, a look into the mystery that surrounds the curse of the Star Baker, and the history of the Hollywood handshake

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam has to tackle a school project on the Second World War, so decides to make a film featuring his grandfather. However, Pops takes matters into his own hands when Adam finds all his war stories mundane. Erica fails to cope with her own cooking and laundry at college and returns home to confront Beverly for over-mothering her, but Murray insists that Beverly starts to teach Erica and Barry basic life skills

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly intervenes when she finds out that Coach Mellor has a strained relationship with his brother, Coach Nick, but when the two men face off in the gym, Adam and Barry join in. Meanwhile, Geoff and Erica struggle with their long-distance relationship

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides to reinvent herself by going to night school so that she can quit her substitute teacher role and own her own business, but Murray dislikes change and tries to convince her to take a different path. Meanwhile, Barry embarks on a makeover of his own, and Erica struggles to balance her academic studies with her social life in college and calls on Adam for assistance

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Jackie fall out over which Halloween costumes to wear, so Murray teaches Adam to agree mindlessly with everything his girlfriend says just to keep her happy. However, Murray's strategy soon backfires, causing issues in his relationship with Beverly. Meanwhile, as Lainey visits Erica at college, Barry aims to get back together with her

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon hires an attractive female assistant, but when she becomes interested in Leonard, Penny decides to mark her territory by sleeping with him. Meanwhile, Howard starts to lose his mind when his return from space is delayed another week. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard returns from his space mission, but the welcome from his friends and family does not meet his expectations. His night alone with Bernadette goes badly, his mother ignores him, and he realises Stuart has taken his place as Raj's best friend. On top of that, Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny kick him out of their group games night. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart hosts a Halloween party at the comic-book store, and Howard talks incessantly about his work on board the International Space Station, annoying his wife and friends. Penny and Leonard have a steamy encounter at the lab. Guest starring real-life astronaut Buzz Aldrin

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon upsets guest star Stephen Hawking when they play an online game of Words with Friends, until Howard advises him to let the scientist win. Elsewhere, Penny enrols in a college class, but decides to keep it a secret from Leonard. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy and Wil Wheaton get into a fight while filming Fun with Flags, Sheldon suffers the consequences of their fall-out. He ends up going to Penny for advice and after getting drunk, confronts the actor in a bid to make him apologise. Bernadette encourages Howard to move out of his mother's house

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends try to solve the mystery of Sheldon's post-lunch activities, following him to a secret room where they discover how he chills out. Elsewhere, Leonard is jealous when Penny starts texting a classmate, but things quickly change when Alex gets flirty with him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pair's friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As part of the relationship agreement, Sheldon reluctantly has to take care of Amy when she gets sick, but she loves the extra attention so much she pretends to remain in poor health. Elsewhere, Howard tries to get some tips on manliness from Penny when he and Bernadette go to visit her father

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: At the start of the new term, Carli organises a fashion show that Simon is eager to participate in. Will tries to shake off his embarrassing reputation, while Jay continues to lie about his sexual experiences. Comedy, starring Emily Head, Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon goes to his first gig since seeing Take That at Wembley Arena, hoping to impress an attractive girl in the year below, but Will, Jay and Neil tag along and jeopardise his chances of wooing her. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon takes his new girlfriend on a double date but his principles are tested when she says she will kiss him only if he lets her redesign his wardrobe. Will considers the idea of spending time with a girl he finds embarrassing and boring. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas, Simon Bird and Hannah Tointon

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon joins his girlfriend Tara on a visit to see her sister at university, so the other boys invite themselves along too. Will insists that he wants to look around his last-choice institution, Jay wants to be there to offer sex advice, and Neil's excuse for going is that he has nothing better to do. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas and Hannah Tointon

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is left home alone when his mother goes away for the weekend with an old school friend, so he decides to take advantage of the situation. After a wild time with the boys ordering items off the internet and raiding the fridge, he wakes up to an unpleasant shock. Comedy, starring Simon Bird and Joe Thomas

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will decides to organise one last adventure for his friends before they all go their separate ways, so the gang heads off for a camping trip in the countryside. While Will draws on all his scout training, Jay, Neil and Simon are not prepared for the great outdoors

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Daisy May Cooper, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring take on the penultimate selection of ludicrous challenges. programme.title: First Dates Abroad
programme.desc: Accountant Ross from Wicklow, who has a track record of being unlucky in love, is hoping his fortunes will change when he meets part-time waitress Sorcha, 33, from Wexford

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. Peralta and Diaz adjust to life behind bars, but while Jake is forced to join a prison gang led by notorious inmate Romero, Rosa puts Captain Holt and Sgt Jeffords to the test by making outrageous lists of chores for her

Tim Meadows, Lou Diamond Phillips and Gina Gershon guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Unfortunately, that loophole rests on his ability to pass an official evaluation performed by Captain Holt. While Boyle provides Peralta with moral support, Jeffords and Santiago help Diaz, who believes Pimento may be cheating on her

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle investigate a serial killer who poses a severe danger to the public. Captain Holt continues to spar with his rival, Commissioner Kelly. Jeffords must deal with some complications resulting from his recent news about his lieutenant's exam

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Desperate circumstances call for desperate measures as Peralta, Captain Holt, Santiago, Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle are forced to ally themselves with some old enemies

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tries to get Sheldon into the Christmas mood by playing a game, but things do not go as planned when Sheldon reveals a childhood trauma. Raj goes out with the girls and reveals he had crushes on both Penny and Bernadette - but not Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is not pleased when his assistant Alex starts flirting with Leonard and has a word with her about it. Unfortunately, his comments are so inappropriate that he is accused of sexual harassment and sent to the university's human resources department, where he ends up dragging Leonard, Raj and Howard into trouble too. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Crystal Maze
programme.desc: Actress Tamzin Outhwaite takes on the role of captain as she and former cricket star Phil Tufnell, Dr Ranj Singh, reality star Francis Boulle and comedian Joel Dommett tackle the maze. Richard Ayoade is their guide as they face as assortment of skill, physical, mystery and mental challenges, where their aim is to win as much time as possible in the Crystal Dome

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old Dom from Hampshire has been nominated for the show by his mum, in a desperate attempt to break his dismal dating record. Dom wants to find a partner who shares his love of adventure and isn't bothered by his posh boy charm. There's also 22-year-old pansexual Izzy, who is open to dating any gender, but with so much on offer, will she make the right choice?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An argument between Leonard and Sheldon over the ending of a Harry Potter book affects Amy and Penny's living arrangements. Meanwhile, Howard goes on a trip to Las Vegas with Bernadette and asks Raj to keep an eye on his mother while he is away

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny celebrate Valentine's Day, but their evening takes a turn for the worse when the latter's ex-boyfriend proposes to his girlfriend in the same restaurant. Meanwhile, Sheldon enlists the help of his assistant Alex to find the perfect gift for Amy

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Master sculptor and gilder Adam Williamson teaches Kirstie Allsop how to apply gold leaf to a second-hand picture frame to give it a luxury look and feel

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Avon Dixon and Giovanna Piscopo from Leicestershire are looking for a holiday home in the Dordogne region of France that will serve as a summer getaway until they can retire there in a few years' time. Ben Hillman shows them what their £100,000 will buy them in this stunning rural corner of the country

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien come across a water trough and a cartwheel as they continue their mission to turn unwanted items into hard cash

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien discover items including baby scales, an oil can and a glass cabinet that are ready for upcycling to turn a profit for their owners

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick helps Paul cut some Vitrolite vintage tiles for an art deco bathroom - but it proves harder than they expected. Some lime plastering back at Paul's chateau requires a search for some horse hair from a local stables. Abbie is busy painting furniture for bedrooms, and mum Karen has problems with their swimming pool, the fire extinguishers certifications all need renewing, and with a big wedding party arriving soon, the to-do list just keeps getting longer

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Wymeswold, Leicestershire, to meet Ally and James, a fearless couple who have taken a gamble buying a tricky site that has eaten up almost all of their cash before work has even begun. As the months turn to years, can they hold their nerve to build the country cottage of their dreams?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Wizards Thatch in Alderley Edge, a village in Cheshire. Owners Ian Lambert and his partner Ali Imiolek hope to cast a spell over the competition, but their guests end up picking out problems with the continental breakfast basket

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Blackpool, where James Reay and Simon Dooley run the one-star Winterbourne Hotel and Theatre Showbar. The contestants seem to be relaxed and impressed, but a rival's feedback sends one of the hosts storming out of the room

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Perfectionist Andrea Hickmott and her partner Nick Bonner-Williams welcome their guests to Northrise Lodge in Hastings, East Susses, but the rooms are criticised and deemed too clinical to relax in. Andrea also panics when she forgets to put sugar on the tables at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stephanie and Dominic Parker (who would go on to find fame in Gogglebox) welcome the rest of the contestants to their B&B, the Salutation in Sandwich, Kent. However, an alcohol-fuelled evening of parlour games jeopardises the hosts' chances to win the prize

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. A wedding proposal appears to be on the cards, and the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Keepers introduce elderly chameleon Mr Parsons to two new prospective partners, and bongo Malaeka shows little interest in her potential mate, Moti. Meanwhile in the aquarium, George the pinstripe damba is spotted in distress, and keepers notice a lump on his gill which may be affecting his breathing

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Couple Mariam and Johnno arrive at their new chateau with their teenage son Monty and discover that they have no running water and that builders are busy in every room. To get respite from the heat and building work, Mariam visits Angel to get help turning her designs into tiles for her new home. Abbie and her mum Karen have wallpaper decisions to make, and wrangle oversized cots as they continue to get their chateau ready for the biggest wedding party of the season

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Chris Moller meets ambitious and innovative people who are creating their dream homes in New Zealand. Robyn and her husband David dream of building a retirement home on the island of Waiheke, with sea views and privacy. However, prime sites on the popular island aren't easy to come by and can be expensive

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Michelle Parsons, an artist and teacher who decided to seize the day and build her own private hideaway in a woodland environment in Essex after she recovered from a serious illness. Together with her architect husband David, Michelle planned to construct a sleek, black-clad, three bedroom house complete with an art studio. However, torrential rain and a potentially disastrous gas leak stalled progress on the build, and as construction gets under way, Kevin wonders whether the couple's decision to eliminate windows on two sides of the property may leave them living in a gloomy bunker

programme.title: Nordic Murders
programme.desc: The body of a supermarket owner from Usedom is discovered in the spa gardens of the neighbouring Polish town of Swinemuende, so Julia and her Polish colleague Marek join up to investigate. The victim was to meet one of her employees to offer her a new apartment in Poland in exchange for a house on the German side of the border, but the apartment inspection never took place. Julia is challenged by the case, not least when Karin decides to be legal counsel to the main suspect. Detective drama, starring Katrin Sass, Marcin Dorocinski and Lisa Pothoff. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Maria, a 52-year-old woman who suffers from MS, is brought in with suspected sepsis. As doctors work to regulate her temperature, her husband Duncan talks about their life together and how they supported each other through her diagnosis. Meanwhile, Eve, who's 83, is in A&E with her husband John after she fell down the stairs into her basement, suffering an open ankle fracture. Elsewhere, six-year-old Grace has come to hospital with her dad Ben after getting a piece of tissue stuck inside her ear

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow 54-year-old Richard, who arrives at St George's hospital suffering symptoms of a suspected stroke. Meanwhile, 76-year-old Peter turns up in A&E with a severe head injury, covered in blood, but it's not clear what happened to him

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partner's parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Maria, a 52-year-old woman who suffers from MS, is brought in with suspected sepsis. As doctors work to regulate her temperature, her husband Duncan talks about their life together and how they supported each other through her diagnosis. Meanwhile, Eve, who's 83, is in A&E with her husband John after she fell down the stairs into her basement, suffering an open ankle fracture. Elsewhere, six-year-old Grace has come to hospital with her dad Ben after getting a piece of tissue stuck inside her ear

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Helen Lawal searches for the secret to perfectly shelled walnuts in California, and Matt Tebbutt hopes to discover what makes sweets sour. Andi Oliver investigates how the cloud gets into the hazy beers that are so trendy currently

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt investigates an intriguing claim about tomato ketchup bottles, Kate Quilton discovers how oysters turned from a Victorian bar snack to a wallet-busting luxury, and Amanda Byram uncovers the difference between medium and large eggs

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: John and Della Baines' daughter Megan has already moved to Cyprus. After visiting her and seeing the island for themselves, John and Della have decided it was the perfect spot for a holiday home. For their budget of £45,000, Jasmine Harman shows them five value apartments in and around the west coast resort of Paphos

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Dentist Michelle Naik and retired entrepreneur Marshal Sutherland from Sheffield have fallen in love with the Caribbean island of Aruba. The couple have now decided it's the perfect place to find an island retreat. With a budget of £130,000 and the help of Scarlette Douglas, they hope to find a holiday home that could one day become a permanent retirement location

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Devon couple Alan and Jayne Poole have been holidaying in Orlando for many years and are in love with American culture so much so that they are now ready to splash out on a holiday home in the Sunshine State. With the help of property expert Laura Hamilton and a budget of £115,000, they are hoping to find somewhere that they and their family can enjoy for years to come

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp catches up with two couples who were looking for homes near the coast. Back in 2013, Phil Spencer helped retirees Peggy and Jon relocate from Derby to Norfolk so they could fulfil their dream of living by the sea, and two years earlier Kirstie was in Devon with local newlyweds Jamie and Sam, who needed help to spend an inheritance wisely. How have their lives changed since their original property search?

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of private chef Ed Versluys and pilates instructor Vicky Anderson, who want to convert a concrete cowshed in the Somerset countryside into a three-bedroom home. With the help of one young builder and the knowledge they can learn from the internet, the couple plan to project manage the conversion themselves. However, they have only eight months and a budget of just over £200k to make a warm and comfortable home with straw bale walls and wide expanses of glass

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Marketing manager Clair Sherwood-Parkin hosts the first party in Darlington, Co Durham, hoping to impress with a Moroccan-inspired feast. However, one guest causes a stir when she introduces herself as the Queen of Sheba, and Clair's party game unearths some shocking truths about her diners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Veterinary surgeon James Emson hosts the second party in Darlington, Co Durham, and decides to accompany his curry main course with a gruesome contest in which he serves up a selection of eyeballs, tongues and other bits of offal, then challenges his guests to identify which animal they came from. Diner Barry l'Anson also manages to leave the party having achieved a lifetime ambition

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barry I'Anson hosts the third dinner party in Darlington, Co Durham, and hopes his love-themed evening will endear him to his guests. Unfortunately for him Clair Sherwood-Parkin is not impressed and begins doubting the host's masculinity, and vet James Emson is concerned what the dessert will be like. Charlotte Langley finds herself wanting a sick bag before the evening is over, and Eseyoma Sodje steals the show during some cringe-worthy entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charlotte Langley hosts the fourth dinner party in Darlington, Co Durham, and asks her guests to attend dressed as their favourite red-carpet celebrity, but as the night progresses, she discovers she is not very good at taking criticism and a tense situation threatens to get out of hand

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Eseyoma Sodje hosts the final dinner party in Darlington, Co Durham, hoping her Nigerian recipes and a hint of glamour will impress her guests. To further improve her chances of bagging the £1,000 prize, she puts on a round of hip-hop karaoke, before the winner is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.desc: This episode focuses on the chances people take in life and whether a gamble ever pays off. 20-year-old Megan is rushed to St George's hospital after being involved in a high speed car crash, and as doctors begin treatment and work to assess her injuries, it soon becomes clear how her hedonistic lifestyle has put her at risk. Meanwhile, James, who's 78, is transferred from his local hospital with suspected internal bleeding, and 40-year-old Jibraeel has lodged a cotton bud in his ear

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A man suffers serious spinal injuries after falling off a mountain bike. As doctors assess the extent of the damage, his wife recalls growing up in apartheid-era South Africa. A medical team gives emergency oxygen to an 83-year-old woman who is struggling to breathe, and a woman is rushed to A&E after her daughter accidently crashed into a lamp post

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

Meanwhile, James, who's 78, is transferred from his local hospital with suspected internal bleeding, and 40-year-old Jibraeel has lodged a cotton bud in his ear

programme.title: The Supervet: Bionic Specials
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick infuses implants with stem cells to grow bone and cartilage in two ground-breaking operations. An energetic seven-month-old Italian Spinone is brought in after scans reveal it has a hole in its shoulder bone. With regenerative medicine opening up new options, the vet offers the puppy's owner a custom-made implant to plug the hole. He also treats a seven-year-old border collie left in constant pain from a broken leg after being hit by a car five months ago. Owner Lisa is reluctant to amputate, so Noel proposes a new treatment that has never been tried before

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton learns that a special enzyme contained in pineapples attacks and destroys dead skin cells in the mouth, with scientists using this enzyme to treat the victims of burns. Jimmy Doherty wants to uncover the secret of how bubbles are added to chocolate bars and Matt Tebbutt asks if there is any truth in the old wives' tale that we should never eat mussels when there's not an ‘R' in the month
