programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Nick and Natalie Hammond are selling their family home in Hertfordshire and want to buy somewhere near the coast with more outdoor space for their four children. Nick's keen on a move to Majorca, having holidayed in Spain as a child, but Natalie would prefer to move to Cornwall. They have a cash budget of £275,000 if they buy in Majorca where Laura Hamilton is on hand to help, or £375,000 if they buy in Cornwall, where Jonnie Irwin tries to beat Laura's properties

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Ceri and Mike Green choose between the Lake District and the French Alps, with Jonnie Irwin showing them three UK properties and Laura Hamilton choosing a trio across the Channel

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Teenage sweethearts Laura and Stuart Queen have lived in the same house in Carlisle for 16 years but now want a change of location and lifestyle. Stuart wants to move to central Scotland, close to family and work. Horse-lover Laura thinks they'll get more property and land in Murcia in Spain. Jonnie Irwin tries to please them both with a budget of £150,000 in central Scotland and Laura Hamilton tempts them with properties in Spain for a budget of £120,000

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell set off on a search for items around Lincolnshire, before heading to an auction at Little Bytham near Stamford

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell journey from Lincolnshire to Nottingham looking for historical gems, while the pair also visit Ely Cathedral

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell visit the Peak District, where they hunt down treasure in the antiques shops across Derbyshire and beyond

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell visit the antiques shops of Yorkshire, along the way meeting a trombone-maker and discovering the history of the rocking horse

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell scour the antiques shops around Sheffield to find something that will give them the edge at the auction. Natasha goes out of her comfort zone when considering some 18th-century pottery, but feels more at home when she spots something from the 1970s. Philip opts for some typically 'Serrell' items, as well as chewing over more prehistoric stuff. He also goes out of his way to prove that chivalry isn't dead. On the road, Philip visits a factory using the world-famous Sheffield steel to make some very fine tools, and Natasha heads to the woods for a spot of foraging and some free food. It's going to be a nail biter at their final auction at Lytham St Annes, Lancashire

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Nick Knowles and the team attempt to build a two storey flexible use centre, which can be used by the local community however it decides. The team are joined by the Duke of Cambridge, who meets local residents and talks to firefighters who were amongst the first responders on the night of the tragic fire at Grenfell Tower

programme.title: Cornwall Air 999
programme.desc: The work of pilots and paramedics of Cornwall Air Ambulance as they race to save lives of holiday-makers and locals across one of Britain's busiest counties

programme.title: The Toe Bro
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a young girl get rid of a persistent wart on her foot. A hockey player seeks treatment for a fungal nail infection

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies
programme.desc: The doctors are in Magaluf to see what a week of heavy drinking has done to the boys' sperm and capacity for erections. Dawn Harper meets a family of two sisters and a cousin who all carry the BRCA1 breast cancer gene and follows their emotional journey to discover how it has affected their bodies, as well as the decisions they make to change their lives. Pixie McKenna helps a man with a serious dimple and uses new technology to face her fear of spiders, and the truck heads to the Midlands, where one man reveals a penis problem

programme.desc: The girls are booked for a concert on a ghost ship - and discover they may be cursed to stay on board forever

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: Kylie confronts her fear of flying while travelling by plane to Paris, after a scientist's secret formula turns the pilot into a pig

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: A teleport device causes Kim and X to swap bodies - and is stolen by a paparazzi reporter before they can change back

programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist is joined by fellow musicians for an impromptu jam session, as well as a chat about their lives in rock. In this edition he is joined by Alice Cooper

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Shaw Somers, Lucy Jones and Dr Giovanni Miletto give advice to a 42-year-old woman who has been eliminating entire food groups from her diet in an effort to combat her traumatising fish odour syndrome. They also help a teenager who worries severe eczema will prevent him fulfilling his dream of becoming an aeroplane cabin crew member. Three hard-drinking students from Leeds put hangover cures to the test, and Dr Pixie McKenna investigates the veracity of health claims made on food packaging

programme.title: Sailing Legend: Sir Robin Knox-Johnston
programme.desc: The story of how Sir Robin Knox-Johnston made history when he became the first man to sail solo and non-stop around the globe in 1968-69

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Dewyne Lindsay visits the district of Thamesmead, which is 11 miles from Charing Cross on the South Bank of the River Thames.

programme.title: The Boy Who Thought He Could Fly ()
programme.desc: A young boy grieving the loss of his mother convinces himself he can fly

programme.title: A Chorus of Disapproval (1988)
programme.desc: A shy widower gets entangled in romantic intrigue while rehearsing with an amateur theatrical troupe in Scarborough. Comedy based on Alan Ayckbourn's stage play, starring Jeremy Irons, Anthony Hopkins, Prunella Scales, Lionel Jeffries, Jenny Seagrove, Gareth Hunt and Patsy Kensit

programme.title: Victim (1961)
programme.desc: A secretly gay barrister discovers his lover has been driven to suicide by blackmailers, who have also extorted money from several other men. Risking his reputation and marriage, he hunts down the culprits, fully aware that it could lead to his own exposure as a homosexual, illegal at the time. Drama, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylvia Syms, Dennis Price and Anthony Nicholls

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: After passing their riding course - one of the toughest in the country - the new troopers graduate. The latest additions to the regiment parade in full ceremonial uniform to mark the occasion - but the last such outing of the season also provides a chance for the soldiers to reflect on fallen comrades in conflicts from World War Two to Iraq

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dorothy welcomes Gary's suggestion of an open relationship, while Dermot continues to woo Deborah

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Medical journalist Michael Mosley and a team of doctors offer advice on health, using their expertise and the latest research to investigate the truth behind various claims being made in the media. Surgeon Gabriel Weston takes part in an experiment at the University of Surrey's Sleep Research Centre to discover whether an extra hour in bed could have major benefits, while A&E specialist Dr Saleyha Ahsan asks if people can be overweight and still healthy, and tests the accuracy of two different methods used to assess fatness

programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: Roy visits Amber's therapist to help raise his spirits, and ends up revealing fantasies about his neighbour Sally, whom the counsellor then meets at a dinner party, where a mutual attraction quickly develops, urging Tom and Roy to take desperate measures to keep them apart. Comedy, starring Clive Swift and Roger Lloyd Pack

programme.title: Great SAS Missions
programme.desc: Using interviews, computer graphics and reconstructions to recount the Second World War SAS mission to infiltrate enemy borders. Heavily armoured cars managed to destroy a number of Hitler's supply lines, and by the time the fighting in North Africa had ended the unit had grown into two full regiments

programme.title: Great SAS Missions
programme.desc: Accounts of daring operations by the elite British unit continuing with the use of confusion techniques to bewilder the enemy while army vehicles attacked reinforcements and communications in Normandy. Interviews with former SAS soldiers and cutting-edge graphics are used to tell the story of the 1944 operation

programme.title: Open Match Racing World Championship Bermuda 2020
programme.desc: The longest running global professional series in the sport of sailing, featuring world class sailors including America's Cup and Olympic champions

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The landmark series from the 1970s continues, telling the history of country music in a script by writer Nik Cohn

programme.title: Sparks and Embers (2015)
programme.desc: A French woman living in London ends her relationship with her boyfriend when she decides to return to her own country. On the day she is due to leave, they meet again for one last goodbye. Despite knowing their break-up is for the best, both find themselves tempted to stay together - but neither feels brave enough to say it. Romantic comedy, starring Kris Marshall and Annelise Hesme

programme.title: Kidnapping Freddy Heineken (2015)
programme.desc: Five men struggling to make ends meet decide to kidnap a beer tycoon who is one of Europe's richest men. The plan is a success, and they demand the biggest ransom in history - but tensions within the group threaten their chances of escaping the law. Fact-based crime drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Jim Sturgess and Sam Worthington

programme.title: Hoodluck (2020)
programme.desc: In the heart of southeast London, winning the lottery rarely happens, but then three guys - Solse, Festa and Kevin - come across a 'Be Lucky' lottery ticket in a stolen handbag

programme.title: The Grass Is Always Grindr
programme.desc: Drama series set in Soho sexual health clinic 56 Dean Street. Young party boy Joe must win happiness with closeted boxer Adam, or risk losing himself to drugs

programme.title: They Made Me a Fugitive (1947)
programme.desc: Soho black marketeers frame a former RAF pilot for murder, forcing him to go on the run until he can exact revenge on them. Thriller, starring Trevor Howard, Sally Gray and Griffith Jones

programme.title: Assassin for Hire (1951)
programme.desc: An assassin who kills to finance his violinist brother's career is tricked into confessing his crimes by a wily police inspector. Drama, starring Sydney Tafler, Ronald Howard, Katherine Blake and John Hewer

programme.title: We Dive at Dawn (1943)
programme.desc: A British submarine crew is unexpectedly ordered to carry out a top-secret mission to sink the German fleet's latest battleship in the Baltic Sea. But it is not long before disaster strikes and the vessel becomes stranded in the middle of the ocean with no fuel or food. Second World War adventure, starring John Mills, Eric Portman, Reginald Purdell and Niall MacGinnis

programme.title: How Mad Was King George?
programme.desc: Prince Charles is among those seeking to restore George III to his proper place in history, as diaries, letters and expert analysis paint a picture of a devoted family man, whose 60-year reign culminated in his receiving accolades as 'the father of the people', while scientists explode the myths surrounding his illness

programme.title: Buttons: A Christmas Tale (2018)
programme.desc: Two orphans have only one wish: to find a home for Christmas. Guardian angels help them discover that miracles can happen

programme.title: Paper!
programme.desc: A piece of London history. Shot in the 1960's on 8mm film featuring the many news vendors around London selling the three evening newspapers

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Shaw Somers, Lucy Jones and Dr Giovanni Miletto give advice to a 42-year-old woman who has been eliminating entire food groups from her diet in an effort to combat her traumatising fish odour syndrome. They also help a teenager who worries severe eczema will prevent him fulfilling his dream of becoming an aeroplane cabin crew member. Three hard-drinking students from Leeds put hangover cures to the test, and Dr Pixie McKenna investigates the veracity of health claims made on food packaging

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon spreads her wings and takes full advantage of her sister's hospitality, but Tracey is having money worries. Ross Kemp guest stars, with Linda Robson and Pauline Quirke

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey makes an appointment with a Harley Street specialist, hoping to allay her suspicions that she may be pregnant. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Killing Hitler
programme.desc: Conclusion of the investigation into Operation Foxley - the 1944 plan to assassinate Adolf Hitler - blending documentary, dramatic reconstruction and expert military analysis to bring to life the blueprint of the audacious plot. Featuring testimonies from members of Churchill's Special Operations Executive and one of the Fuhrer's most trusted bodyguards

programme.title: Pirates of Somalia (2017)
programme.desc: In 2008, rookie journalist Jay Bahadur forms a plan to embed himself among the pirates of Somalia, and provides a rare profile of these men and the forces that drive them. Fact-based drama, starring Al Pacino and Evan Peters

programme.title: Hound (2017)
programme.desc: An alcoholic loner is snapped out of his misery when his faithful dog is murdered by a local gangster. Overcoming his addiction, he transforms his life by mastering martial arts, then puts his skills to use seeking vengeance. Crime thriller, starring Sacharissa Claxton and Neal Ward

programme.title: Deceitful Love (2016)
programme.desc: The lives of a wealthy British Indian family are turned upside down when dark family secrets are made public after a family bereavement. Drama, starring Indiraa and Gurdial Sira

programme.title: A Moody Christmas
programme.desc: Dan decides not to go home for Christmas, but could a hopeful text from Cora persuade him otherwise? Kevin finally gets the pool he's been wishing for. Australian comedy, starring Ian Meadows

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Brockley, Peckham and Rotherhithe. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Chester to learn about an experiment to find out whether standing up a few more hours each day could have major health benefits. Gabriel Weston witnesses a womb transplant, Saleyha Ahsan shows how to stop someone choking and Chris van Tulleken finds out if vitamin supplements are important to wellbeing

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: For the first time in its long history, the famously discreet luxury hotel in Mayfair, central London, opens its doors to documentary cameras, with director Jane Treays spending a year behind the scenes following staff and guests. The Melchors from California arrive for their annual two-week stay, rekindling their relationship with personal butler Michael Lynch, while energetic general manager Thomas Kochs travels to New York to drum up new business from leading US travel agents

programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.desc: Two married strangers meet by chance in a railway station waiting room, and their paths later cross many times until the pair become friends and their meetings a fixed arrangement. But as their feelings for each other transform from friendship into passion, both come to realise the affair is doomed to fail. Remake of David Lean's 1948 classic, starring Richard Burton and Sophia Loren

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: Author and entrepreneur Michael Hayman interviews the business leaders at the heart of London's most exciting success stories

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Lancaster to find out how much air pollution a typical family breathes in and whether trees could be the answer to the problem. Chris van Tulleken explores the world of probiotics, Gabriel Weston examines a novel cure for migraines that was discovered by chance in a beauty clinic, and Saleyha Ahsan demonstrates how to revive a victim of drowning

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: The Second World War saw men from all classes unite to fight the Nazis, and this programme meets some of the last surviving pilots of the Battle of Britain. Women, who had been excluded from many jobs, worked in everything from anti-aircraft gun batteries to steel-making factories. The Blitz saw rescue workers risk all to save those trapped in bombed buildings. For many of the era's last survivors, the defiant spirit that brought the nation together remains one of their proudest moments, as this documentary reveals

programme.title: The Harder They Come (1973)
programme.desc: A naive young man from rural Jamaica heads for Kingston in search of reggae stardom, only to get involved in the shady world of drug dealing as his musical career takes off. With no other option but to go on the run, he fights back against the system which forced him into a life of crime and becomes a political hero in the process. Crime drama, starring Jimmy Cliff, Janet Barkley, Carl Bradshaw and Bob Charlton

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Phillip Schofield invites two more competitors to put their skills to the test in the high-pressure contest. Adam Bedford hopes that winning will give him a chance to offer his wife a honeymoon to remember, while rival Nathalie Hannath has a much more practical motive for seeking the jackpot - she plans to buy double-glazing for her entire family. However, both must prove their abilities in a series of increasingly difficult challenges, ranging from agility tests to skill trials, before they can claim the top prize of £250,000

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Reality star Joey Essex and Coronation Street's Kym Marsh (Michelle Connor) try to beat the Cube and win £250,000 for their chosen charities. The contestants face up to seven trials of skill, dexterity, reaction, wit and wisdom, under intense pressure to hold their nerve as the studio audience watches their every move. Phillip Schofield is on hand to provide words of encouragement

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Mollie King from the Saturdays tackles a series of fiendishly difficult challenges as she tries to win up to £250,000 for her chosen charity. Cheered by on bandmates Una Foden, Frankie Sandford, Rochelle Humes and Vanessa White in the studio, the singer is under intense pressure to hold her nerve and avoid slip-ups inside The Cube. Back in 2012, Mo Farah became the first contestant to walk away with the jackpot - a feat nobody else has managed since. How will Mollie compare to the Olympic gold medallist? Phillip Schofield is on hand to provide words of encouragement

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Extended highlights of the First Test at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane, as the 2013 three-match series got under way. The tourists had already played here against Queensland Reds and will have been aware of the need to start strongly against the injury-hit Wallabies. Lions coach Warren Gatland has a strong squad to select from and was looking to begin in the same fashion as the 2001 vintage, who won in Brisbane in the opening Test of that tour

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the Second Test at the Etihad Stadium in Melbourne, as the Lions aimed to clinch the 2013 series after winning a thrilling First Test 23-21. The Lions suffered their heaviest defeat on this ground during the 2001 tour, as the Aussies overturned a half-time deficit to run away 35-14 victors. With just one Test remaining, the result here will determine whether there is anything riding on next Saturday's final showdown

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the third and final Test at the ANZ Stadium in Sydney, as the 2013 tour reached its conclusion. The opening two Tests were both decided by the narrowest of margins - the Lions prevailed 23-21 in the opener in Brisbane, as Australia missed a chance to win the match with the final kick of the game, before the Wallabies earned revenge by triumphing 16-15 in Melbourne, with the visitors failing to score from a last-gasp penalty attempt on that occasio

programme.title: How The 2007 ICC World Cup Was Won
programme.desc: A look back at the 2007 staging of the World Cup in the West Indies, a tournament that featured 51 matches in the Caribbean, with Australia starting as reigning champions. The established nations didn't have it their own way in the group stages, and a number of upsets throughout the tournament helped to ensure the drama increased until the showpiece occasion at the Kensington Oval in Barbados
